data.reasoningText: The user wants me to run coverage analysis on the project. They mention that coverage data is already in `TestResults/coverage.cobertura.xml`. Let me first look at what's available and then generate a coverage report.

data.content:
Here's the coverage summary:

**ContosoUniversity.Services.StudentService** — `42.5%` line coverage

| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Line coverage | 42.5% (20/47 lines) |
| Branch coverage | 43.7% (7/16 branches) |
| Method coverage | 100% (4/4 methods touched) |
| Full method coverage | 25% (1/4 fully covered) |

The `Enroll` method has decent coverage (75% lines), but `CalculateGpa` is poorly covered (25% lines, 20% branches) — most of its logic is untested. The report is saved at `TestResults/CoverageReport/Summary.txt`.
